with Lagrange DeepProve-style proof system.      A \"proof\" is a compressed commitment that a specific model produced      a specific output \u2014 verified on-chain without re-running inference. Proof flow:   1. Inference provider runs model + generates zkML proof off-chain   2. Provider calls submitProof(attestationId, proofHash, publicInputsHash)   3. Anyone can verify: verifyProof(attestationId) \u2192 bool In production, integrate Lagrange DeepProve verifier contract at `proveVerifier`. For now, stores commitment hashes \u2014 upgradeable to full zk-SNARK verification.","kind":"dev","methods":{"setDeepProveVerifier(address)":{"details":"Set to address(0) to use commitment-only mode"},"submitProof(bytes32,bytes32,bytes32)":{"params":{"attestationId":"The attestation this proof covers","proofHash":"keccak256 of the full proof bytes (stored off-chain / IPFS)","publicInputsHash":"keccak256(modelHash ++ outputHash) \u2014 public inputs"},"returns":{"proofId":"Unique ID for this proof"}},"withdrawBounty(bytes32)":{"details":"Prevents ETH from being permanently locked in the contract","params":{"requestId":"The request ID returned by requestProof()"}}},"title":"ZKVerifier","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"getProof(bytes32)":{"notice":"Get proof details for an attestation"},"hasValidProof(bytes32)":{"notice":"Check if an attestation has a valid zkML proof"},"requestProof(bytes32)":{"notice":"Request a proof for an existing attestation (with optional bounty)"},"setDeepProveVerifier(address)":{"notice":"Set Lagrange DeepProve verifier contract address"},"submitProof(bytes32,bytes32,bytes32)":{"notice":"Submit a zkML proof for an existing attestation"},"withdrawBounty(bytes32)":{"notice":"Withdraw an unfulfilled bounty (ETH refund for requester)"}},"notice":"zkML proof verification for Verified AI","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/ZKVerifier.sol":"ZKVerifier"},"evmVersion":"osaka","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":false,"runs":200},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"]},"sources":{"src/ZKVerifier.sol":{"keccak256":"0x68ee20b2ccf4626b8cb349c101d10b05aa125cb15bb382269ff03874d50d4afe","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://add4db3529538c32336f6d65ed08d54001bacdf60b7432b95d50d9c9c2cc94a5","dweb:/ipfs/QmZFkhUYSzwD6PqxhG4TkPAzUgVB5oVcWDd92F4dCsZC5x"]}},"version":1}

params.proofHash: keccak256 of the full proof bytes (stored off-chain / IPFS)

params.requestId: The request ID returned by requestProof()

getProof(bytes32).notice: Get proof details for an attestation
